top.title: What we're learning about suspected Washington press dinner gunman
top.summary: The man arrested at the event attended by President Trump is due in court on Monday.

top.title: Trump says King will be 'very safe' during US visit after security talks
top.summary: The state visit will go ahead despite concerns raised after a gunman targeted an event attended by the president.

top.title: Colombia offers record $1.4m-reward for rebel it blames for deadly bomb attack
top.summary: Officials say a rebel leader known as "Marlon" ordered the attack in which 20 people were killed.

top.title: China blocks Meta's $2bn acquisition of AI start-up Manus
top.summary: It comes after months of scrutiny by Chinese regulators over deal struck with Facebook owner.

top.title: I brought my husband back for his funeral as a hologram
top.summary: After nearly 60 years of marriage, Pam wanted to honour her husband Bill with a hologram at his funeral.
